title: What exactly do Aoba and Kaji do anyway
display_title: What exactly do Aoba and Kaji do anyway
wikitext:
[]: What exactly do Aoba and Kaji do, anyway?             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jul 18, 2008 6:38 am Aside from lurking about, acting carelessly cynical and occasionally speaking a few lines of (technobabble / cryptic nonsense), just what do Aoba and Kaji actually do at NERV? Fanwank away, folks!

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Jul 18, 2008 7:11 am ? Aoba is someone directly under Ritsuko in the Techincal Division and works along with Hyuga and Maya. Maya seems to work with Melchior, Hyuga with Balthasar and Aoba with Caspar. Maya usually reports on the synch-related stuff to Ritsuko, Hyuga on the wave pattern of Angels, and Aoba on the radar arrays around Japan and the intercept systems - implying that each supercomputer handles specific functions. Aoba, along with Maya and Hyuga each have the authority to shut down the input/output system in their respective Magus. Ryoji is a triple agent trying to come closer to the truth of what Nerv is up to, he steals the Adam sample held in Germany and gives it to Gendo to secure his place along his side as Seele wanted him to - he's there to tell Seele if Ikari plans to betray them, but he has his own interests. He was also likely the person who kept the Japanese government informed as to what was going on amongst the other agents who were working at Nerv (who would have also leaked the information on the 3rd Angel Incident to Japan Heavy Chemical Industries), hence their decision during End of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Jul 18, 2008 7:25 am It's their job to find out if Dennis Hopper and his traveling troupe of underage Mexican prostitutes know why kids love the taste of Cinnamon Toast Crunch.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jul 18, 2008 7:47 am Guess I need to be more specific, eh? With the other bridge bunnies there is an impression that beyond sitting at terminals they also report to a senior member and has a specialization; Maya is Ritsuko's aide and focuses on eva and pilot data, while Mokoto performs all manner of tasks for Misato ranging from angel analysis, combat transportation, and... her dry cleaning. Given that, is Aoba attched to anyone in a similar way? I kinda lean towards making him Fuyutski's aide, which might help explain his transition guide(s), but that's purely unsubstantiated speculation. Kaji is even harder to pin down, though. Presumably he has a job title of some sort on his office door, but does he even make the slightest pretense of being anything other than a spy? We know what he does when nobody is looking, but what is he technically supposed to be doing the rest of the time?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Jul 18, 2008 7:56 am Kaji planned the attack in ep9. Maybe he's a tactician?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Jul 18, 2008 8:07 am NemZ wrote: Given that, is Aoba attched to anyone in a similar way?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jul 18, 2008 9:29 am Zuggy wrote: Maya fancies Ritsuko and Hyuga fancies Misato, so you're asking who Aoba fancies...? He does his job, which has already been covered in my previous post.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Jul 18, 2008 10:04 am Actually, as Misato says in episode 9, Kaji has no real "job" at Nerv. Ostensibly he's supposed to be part of "Nerv intelligence" and basically Gendo's go-pher. Probably handling day-to-day coverups and such. In reality, Kaji is a triple agent: Seele thinks he's their spy inside Nerv, and Gendo thinks Kaji is his spy inside Seele, when in reality, he's working for the Japanese government and playing Nerv and Seele off against each other. Of course, while Kaji is nominally a secret agent for the Japanese government, he's really investigating the Evangelion project because he personally wants to find out what's going on, though occasionally his contacts (dog-lady/cat-lady) get info from him. That is, Seele thinks he's their spy, when in reality he stole Adam from Nerv-Germany to give to Gendo. This gained Gendo's trust, enabling Kaji to investigate him more. Eventually Gendo and later Seele realize that Kaji is a spy, but Gendo decided not to move against him for a while because that would alert Seele that Gendo knew they were trying to spy on him, and he wanted to lull them into thinking he didn't know they were spying on Nerv. Eventually Kaji PO'd both Nerv and Seele so much that either Nerv or Seele could plausibly have killed him. I kind of lean towards thinking Seele, because outright killing Kaji kind of lacked the subtlety I'd expect from Gendo (that, and Kaji mentioned that they found out he stole Adam, which I think it more than enough cause for them to flip) Aoba's just another one of the technicians; one could follow all the dialogue he does, but this is an old observation; Hyuga is Misato's assistant and Maya is Ritsuko's assistant, and Aoba isn't "paired" with anyone.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 18, 2008 10:45 am Zuggy wrote: Aoba is someone directly under Ritsuko in the Techincal Division and works along with Hyuga and Maya.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Jul 18, 2008 11:21 am Reichu wrote: Zuggy wrote: Aoba is someone directly under Ritsuko in the Techincal Division and works along with Hyuga and Maya.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Jul 18, 2008 1:41 pm Kaji is there to serve as a source of jealously for the Misato fanboys. Aoba is in charge of air guitar.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 18, 2008 2:23 pm Zuggy wrote: so you're asking who Aoba fancies...?

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Fri Jul 18, 2008 3:53 pm I thought Aoba had the hots for Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Jul 18, 2008 4:06 pm Reichu wrote: Maya is technically the only one who reports directly to Ritsuko; they're both in the Science Division. Hyuga is in Tactics, under Misato.

Fanwank away, folks!

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Jul 18, 2008 7:11 am ? Aoba is someo
